title: Lowcode Event Envelope
description: Top-level wrapper delivered to every event sink (webhook, kafka, redis, …). The `data` field shape depends on `type`; see per-type payload schemas under records.* and metadata.*.

type.description: Event type identifier, e.g. records.after.insert or metadata.table.created

tenantId.description: Tenant id (X-Tenant-Id) that produced the event

tableId.description: Logical table name when the event is scoped to a table

occurredAt.description: UTC timestamp (RFC3339Nano) when the change occurred

data.description: Type-specific payload; see payload schema for this event type
